raw_consumer_statement: Created a dispute with the credit card company and sent them a lot of information in regards to my dispute a few times. They kept saying the didn't receive the information but then closed out my case. They finally admitted the received the information but they couldn't view what I sent them because they're system compresses pictures so they can't make them out that easily, even though the person I talked to could. Stated the case would be reopened but it never was.
